name: tb-nudge
description: Nudges you about sent emails that never got a reply, across all accounts. Flags and tags the message, and pre-filters nudges through a locally-trained (no data leaves your machine) TF-IDF + logistic regression classifier that judges whether a reply was actually expected - with a per-message explanation and a preferences page showing the classifier's global word weights.
author: Nicolo Brandizzi
